title: rubus strictispinus
intro: Rubus strictispinus, also known as the 'thorny blackberry', is a shrub species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Rubus strictispinus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its health benefits include relief from fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as potential anti-cancer properties.
